insight_summary: England Vs Mexico is gaining traction with your audience. Post soon with a hook that invites debate or personal reaction.

next_post.hook: England Vs Mexico is not dying — it is just changing, and older audiences hate that.
next_post.content_idea: Open on a split screen: what older Brits assume about England Vs Mexico vs what younger audiences actually say in the comments.
next_post.format: Yes/No debate post with comment-bait question overlay
next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into curiosity, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.
